business.headline: Is India's gold loan boom quietly building a default risk?Gold loans have grown nearly 3.8 times since March 2022. Their share in the retail credit market has also increased sharply, rising from 5.9% to 11.1% by December 2025. This makes gold loans the second-largest retail loan category after home loans.

DA hike update: Central government staff to protest on April 16Weeks after it was expected, the DA hike for January 2026 is still pending. With no update from the government, central government employee body is preparing to protest on April 16.

Zero tax to pay? 3 big reasons why you should still file your ITRIf your income is low and your taxes come to zero, you might think filing an ITR is not needed. But skipping it could mean missing out on some useful benefits that go beyond just paying tax.

8th Pay Commission: Unions push for Rs 69,000 minimum pay and 6% annual hikeAt the centre of the demands is a sharp jump in minimum basic pay to Rs 69,000. The committee has suggested a fitment factor of 3.83, which would significantly raise existing salaries and pensions.

Don't let these 5 mistakes weaken your term insurance coverA term insurance plan can be your family's strongest safety net, but only if it's chosen wisely. Knowing the common mistakes beforehand can help you choose a policy that truly protects your loved ones.

I lost Rs 10,000 in a week as war hit stock markets. Why I didn't stop my SIPsAs the West Asia war sent markets into free fall, I lost Rs 10,000 in a week but didn't stop my SIPs, even when everything on screen told me to. Here's what happened next.

Sensex jumps 1,200 points: 3 reasons why stock market is rising todayAt around 9:48 am, the BSE Sensex was up 1,217.31 points, or 1.58%, at 78,064.88. It opened at 77,981.10 and touched a high of 78,270.42, while the low stood at 77,849.52.
Sensex, Nifty open higher on hopes of renewed US-Iran talksThe S&P BSE Sensex was up 1,189.51 points to 78,037.08, while the NSE Nifty50 rose 366.40 points to 24,209.05 as of 9:26 am.

Sensex, Nifty opening: Will stock market open higher or lower today?Early signals suggest a positive opening. GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 24,228 at 7:34 am. This points to the Nifty 50 opening around 1.6% higher than its last close of 23,842.65 on Monday. Domestic markets were shut on Tuesday due to a public holiday.

Supreme Court closes Sandesara fraud case after Rs 5,000 crore settlementDuring the proceedings, the Sandesara Group paid Rs 3,507 crore directly to the lending consortium, while an additional Rs 1,192 crore was recovered through liquidation. In its compliance order dated December 17, 2025, the Supreme Court recorded a final settlement deposit of Rs 5,111.43 crore.

War-led energy crisis could drag global growth to 2%: IMFAs conflict in West Asia deepens, the IMF warns energy shocks could push global growth toward near-recession levels, exposing fragile economies while inflation remains stubbornly elevated across markets.

IMF raises India FY27 GDP to 6.5% despite global conflict headwindsOne of the key reasons behind the improved outlook is a reduction in additional US tariffs on Indian goods. These tariffs have come down from 50% to 10%, easing pressure on exports.
EPFO new rule: Members can delink wrong Member IDs from UANThe updated system is expected to reduce confusion caused by duplicate or incorrect provident fund accounts.

IEA slashes oil demand and supply view as Iran war rattles markets: ReportThe ongoing conflict in Iran has forced the IEA to revise global oil market predictions, signalling reduced supply and demand growth amid geopolitical tensions.

SIPs are rising, but is retail conviction in equities slowing? Here's the answerRecord SIP numbers suggest confidence, yet other signals point to caution. Retail investors are not exiting equities — they are simply investing with greater care and clarity.

New TRACES portal launched: How will it change your TDS filing experience?The Income Tax Department has rolled out a new TRACES portal aimed at improving usability and speeding up processes. But how much difference will it actually make to your TDS filing experience?

Earn Rs 12 lakh or Rs 30 lakh? See how your gratuity changes with 50% basic payIn Part 1, we explained how take-home may fall despite the same CTC. Here, we look at how the 50% rule impacts long-term benefits like gratuity.

Unclaimed assets: How to recover your money from banks, shares, EPF and insuranceUnclaimed money is not lost, but recovering it requires awareness, documentation and persistence, making early action crucial before delays and low returns quietly erode its real value over time.

Markets fall, Adani Power hits all-time high: What's driving the surge?Adani Power's rally highlights how strong demand outlook and defensive positioning can drive select stocks higher, even as broader markets struggle with uncertainty and lack of sustained momentum.

From April to March: Here are all the key FY27 tax deadlines you must trackThe tax calendar may seem long, but staying aware of these dates can make things much simpler. Instead of rushing at the last minute, spreading out your compliance and investments across the year can help you avoid stress and penalties.

entertainment.headline: Toaster review: Rajkummar Rao serves dark comedy right, crisp and twistedRelease Date:Wed Apr 15, 2026 Toaster review: A Rs 5,000 toaster sets off a chain of chaos in this sharp, tightly controlled dark comedy led by Rajkummar Rao's quietly brilliant performance. Smart, strange and consistently engaging, the film balances humour with menace.

John Abraham announces Force 3 filming with Harshvardhan Rane, release date out John Abraham has officially announced the filming of Force 3, featuring Harshvardhan Rane and set to release in March next year.

Akshay Kumar trolled for 'reading off teleprompter' on Naagin 7, fans defend actor Akshay Kumar's special appearance in Naagin 7 as a Naag Guru has stirred buzz due to his apparent use of a teleprompter, sparking mixed reactions among viewers.

Ramayana Part 1: Will Ranbir Kapoor's Rama clash with Yash's Ravana? Yash opened up on his on-screen clash with Ranbir Kapoor's Rama in Ramayana. Yash, who portrays Ravana in the film, spoke about his dynamics with Ranbir at the CinemaCon 2026.

Bobby Deol says Dharmendra's death brought him closer to sisters Esha, Ahana Bobby Deol opened up about how his father, legendary actor Dharmendra's death, strengthened the bond with his half-sisters Esha Deol and Ahana Deol. The actor also admitted that he often wishes he had spent more time with Dharmendra.

52 Blue: Neha Dhupia makes international debut with emotional migrant drama Neha Dhupia steps into a raw, deglam role in 52 Blue, which explores the journey of a migrant worker against the backdrop of the FIFA World Cup in Qatar.

Short-tempered, verbally aggressive: Lena Dunham recalls working with Adam Driver Lena Dunham opened up about her complicated relationship with her Girls co-star Adam Driver in her memoir Famesick. She detailed his angry outbursts, including shouting on set and throwing a chair.

Blinkit of Balochistan: Bimal Oberoi, Dhurandhar's Shirani, reacts to meme fest Bimal Oberoi, Shirani Baloch of the Dhurandhar films, is unexpectedly an internet sensation, with his character turning into a viral meme favourite across India. The actor finds the meme craze amusing and is amazed by how deeply audiences connect with his role.

Tom Cruise unveils Digger sneak-peek at CinemaCon, set for October release Hollywood star Tom Cruise showcased a sneak preview of his upcoming film Digger at CinemaCon, expressing enthusiasm for the year ahead in cinema. The film, directed by Alejandro G. Iñárritu, is set for release in October 2026 and features an ensemble cast.

Yash breaks down Toxic in first interview: Not your typical gangster-action film In his first interview for Toxic, Yash hints at a layered, ambitious film with unexpected depth. At CinemaCon 2026, he also discusses Indian cinema's global evolution, and what the world can expect from us.

Passenger trailer makes you rethink road trips with its chilling horror. Watch The trailer for the much-awaited horror film Passenger has been unveiled, showcasing a terrifying story of a couple chased by a demonic entity after a fatal accident. Directed by Andre Ovredal, the film is set to release in cinemas on May 29.

Jana Nayagan, Sikandar and more: Films leaked before first day first show Vijay's Jana Nayagan leak has again brought to focus a malady that seems to have no cure. We look at some of the biggest pre-release leaks, even as the industry continues facing security and control woes.

Dhurandhar 2 box office Day 27: Bigger 4th Tuesday than Monday for Ranveer's film Dhurandhar 2 showed a surprising jump on Day 27, with its fourth Tuesday outperforming Monday. Can Ranveer Singh's blockbuster hold steady with new competition arriving?

Euphoria Season 3 review: Bigger, bolder and unnecessaryRelease Date:Sat Apr 12, 2025 Euphoria Season 3 shifts its characters into adulthood with bigger ideas, but often loses emotional clarity along the way. Despite strong performances, especially from Zendaya, the season feels more distant than impactful.

Sarabhai actor Rajesh Kumar calls out class system on film sets, star insecurity Actor Rajesh Kumar opened up about the class system on film sets, saying only a few voices shape decisions while others are sidelined. He also spoke about insecurity among lead actors and recalled how the lack of rehearsals and interaction affects performances.

Trisha shares her pet dog posts after hoax bomb call at her Chennai home Actor Trisha Krishnan's Chennai home received a second bomb threat in six months, confirmed as a hoax by local police. Despite the scare, Trisha remained calm and active on social media.

Adivi Sesh on Dacoit, what pan-India means to him and why he writes his own stories Adivi Sesh's new film Dacoit blends love and revenge. The actor shared insights on his creative freedom, pan-India appeal and the joy of writing his own stories to offer fresh narratives to viewers.

Tribute to Asha Bhosle, Lata Mangeshkar: Family plans 1000-bed mega hospital Late singers Asha Bhosle and Lata Mangeshkar's brother Hridaynath Mangeshkar announced plans to build Asia's largest hospital. The state-of-the-art facility will be a lasting tribute to the legendary sisters' legacy.

Explained: Why Vijay's Jana Nayagan couldn't have been leaked from editing table Soon after Vijay's Jana Nayagan was leaked, the needle of suspicion pointed at the film's editor. While the edit table is often blamed in such cases, the technical reality is far more complex, say senior film editors.

general news.headline: Forced namaz, groping, humiliation – In Nashik TCS case, FIRs list grave chargesThe alleged incidents, involving complainants aged 18 to 25, reportedly occurred over two to three years since 2022. Charges include molestation, rape on the pretext of marriage, and religious coercion.

Supreme Court pauses interim bail for Pawan Khera in case by Assam CM's wifeLast week, the Telangana High Court granted a one-week anticipatory bail to Khera, with a bench of Justice K Sujana allowing him time to approach the appropriate forum for anticipatory bail, noting that he could move within a week.

ED raids Punjab university owned by AAP MP who replaced Raghav Chadha in Rajya SabhaAshok Mittal, a 61-year-old businessman and educationist who heads the Lovely Group, including the Lovely Professional University (LPU), was recently appointed the Aam Aadmi Party's deputy leader in the Rajya Sabha, replacing Raghav Chadha.

Will China deploy its all-powerful navy amid Trump's Hormuz blockade?Throughout the Iran war, China has remained a silent player. However, Trump's naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has changed the calculus. A major chunk of China's oil and gas comes through the vital waterway. Will China be forced to deploy its all-powerful navy?

Buzz intensifiesAs Samrat Choudhary takes charge as Bihar's first BJP Chief Minister, there is a debate over the state's prohibition policy, brought in by Nitish Kumar. The buzz has intensified that Bihar might review its policy banning the sale of alcohol amid Choudhary's swearing-in.

As Meloni's ties with Trump cool, Iran posts cheeky job application to ItalyThe post came after Giorgia Meloni called Donald Trump's remarks on Pope Leo "unacceptable," marking a rare public criticism that reflected broader outrage across Italy.

Iran's new challenge to US, Israel: Will rebuild faster than you can destroyThe US and Israel have hit bridges and railway tracks to cripple Iran's transport infrastructure. Tehran, however, has claimed it restored key rail links within days, signalling a resilience and highlighting the devotion of its engineers. The rebuilding might outpace the destruction itself.

EPS bets on NDA chemistry, strongman persona in his toughest Tamil Nadu battleIn a high-stakes three-cornered Tamil Nadu battle, Edappadi Palaniswami bets on grit and ground game to outlast both Stalin's incumbency and Vijay's surge.

Live: Huge suspense over CBSE Class 10 results; here's how to check when outCBSE Board Class 10 Result 2026 Live Updates: The Central Board of Secondary Education is likely to announce the Class 10 results shortly, keeping over 25 lakh students on edge. Once released, students will be able to check their scores on official websites such as results.cbse.nic.in and cbse.gov.in. Recent signals from digital platforms suggest that the wait may soon be over. DigiLocker, the government's platform for storing and accessing official documents, has indicated that the results are expected soon. Similarly, the UMANG App has also hinted at an imminent release, further building anticipation among students and parents.

Mumbai woman, Swiftie auto-driver's musical Blank Space duet is too wholesome to missA Mumbai auto ride turned into a full-blown concert when a woman and her driver sang Blank Space together, creating a viral moment that's equal parts wholesome and unforgettable.

Claude Opus 4.7 is coming sooner than expected, already crashing Adobe and Figma stocksAnthropic is reportedly working on the next version of its AI model, Claude Opus. sports.headline: Only retired IPL stars come to PSL: Ahmed Shahzad gives Pakistan reality-check Ahmed Shehzad criticised PSL's approach to banning players joining IPL, urging focus on growth as PCB penalised Muzarabani and others for withdrawing from PSL contracts.

Brevis also expressed confidence after returning from injury, adding depth to the side following his match-winning contribution against Kolkata Knight Riders.

Big blow for KKR? On-air blunder after Gaikwad's dismissal leaves fans in spilts Michael Clarke's "big blow for KKR" remark after Ruturaj Gaikwad's dismissal sparked reactions, with fans highlighting the irony during CSK's win over KKR in IPL 2026.

Should CSK be worried about Ruturaj Gaikwad's poor start? IPL 2026: Ruturaj Gaikwad, who has been one of the most consistent performers in the Indian Premier League, has had a rough start to the new season. The Chennai Super Kings captain has scored only 63 runs in five matches.

Viktor Axelsen retires at 32 in shock call, explains decision in emotional Insta post Two-time Olympic champion Viktor Axelsen announced his retirement from professional badminton on Tuesday, April 15. The 32-year-old from Denmark said he was not able to carry on due to recurring back injury issues.

Rinku Singh overhyped? Ex-captain says KKR star not good enough for No. 5 role IPL 2026: Former India captain Kris Srikkanth said Rinku Singh is not suited for the No. 5 role, criticising Kolkata Knight Riders' decision-making after their 32-run loss to Chennai Super Kings. KKR remain the only winless side this season, with four defeats and just one point from a rain-affected game.

IPL 2026: RCB sweat on Virat Kohli's fitness, seek table-topping win vs LSG IPL 2026, RCB vs LSG: Virat Kohli will be in focus after his injury as Royal Challengers Bengaluru get set to lock horns with the Lucknow Super Giants on Wednesday at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium in Bengaluru.

KKR power coach Andre Russell could've done more than Rs 25 crore Cameron Green: Kaif Mohammad Kaif slammed KKR's decision to sideline Andre Russell and back Rs 25 crore Cameron Green after another loss, as the team remains winless in IPL 2026.

CSK vs KKR: How MS Dhoni's words sparked Noor Ahmad's turnaround at Chepauk CSK vs KKR: Noor Ahmad starred with 3/21 as CSK beat KKR, with bowling coach Sriram revealing how MS Dhoni's advice and Akeal Hosein's inputs helped the spinner find his rhythm at Chepauk.

Barcelona come undone as Atletico Madrid return to Champions League semifinals FC Barcelona's early dominance wasn't enough as Atletico Madrid advanced to the UEFA Champions League semifinals, continuing Barca's struggles in Europe after another knockout exit.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's code cracked by an IPL rookie. Will others follow? IPL 2026: SRH debutant Praful Hinge removed Vaibhav Sooryavanshi with a perfectly executed hard-length delivery, aimed squarely at a well-known vulnerability. The plan was no secret, but it was Hinge's precision and discipline that set him apart from others who had tried and failed.

Play of the Day: Ruturaj Gaikwad's Noor ploy scripts historic low for KKRKolkata Knight Riders lost their fourth game of the IPL 2026 season after falling to Chennai Super Kings in Chepauk. While Noor won the Player of the Match award for his sensational spell, Ruturaj Gaikwad's captaincy perhaps did not get the accolades it deserved.

KKR woes deepen: Ajinkya Rahane fined after Chepauk loss to CSKKolkata Knight Riders captain Ajinkya Rahane has been fined after his side maintained a slow over-rate during their 32-run defeat to Chennai Super Kings in the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 at the MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai.

Barcelona vs Atletico: Fermin Lopez suffers horror injury in quarter-finalsFermin Lopez suffered a nasty facial injury after being struck by Juan Musso's boot during Barcelona's Champions League quarter-final clash against Atletico Madrid. The incident led to a lengthy stoppage as the midfielder received treatment on the pitch.

After CSK win two in a row, Ruturaj feels it's coming together for ChennaiIPL 2026: Chennai Super Kings captain Ruturaj Gaikwad said it is "coming together slowly" for his side after the five-time IPL winners recorded a second consecutive win, beating Kolkata Knight Riders by 32 runs. Notably, CSK won two in a row for the first time since April 2024.

Yet to win a game, Ajinkya Rahane urges KKR to stay positive after loss vs CSKKKR captain Ajinkya Rahane had to face the broadcasters after the team remained winless in the Indian Premier League 2026. Chasing 193, KKR faltered in Chennai and lost the game by 32 runs.

Candidates Chess: R Vaishali draws with Zhongyi, stays in contention for the titleIndian Grandmaster R Vaishali held her nerve to stay in the hunt for the title at the FIDE Women's Candidates Tournament 2026, playing out a crucial draw against China's Tan Zhongyi in the penultimate round on Tuesday.

Uzbekistan's Sindarov sets up World Championship title clash with GukeshUzbekistan's rising star Javokhir Sindarov stamped his authority on the global stage by winning the 2026 Candidates Chess Tournament on Tuesday, earning the right to challenge reigning world champion D Gukesh for the crown later this year.

New year, same old KKR as CSK apply spin choke at ChepaukIPL 2026, CSK vs KKR: Chennai Super Kings racked up back-to-back wins as they beat the Kolkata Knight Riders by 32 runs on Wednesday at the MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai. With the defeat, KKR stayed winless and at the bottom of the table.

Javier Mascherano resigns as Inter Miami head coach after historic MLS Cup winJavier Mascherano has resigned as head coach of Inter Miami CF, just four months after leading the team to its first MLS Cup title. The club said the Argentine stepped down due to "personal reasons."

Rs 10,000 for a bus ride? USA sets ridiculous fares for FIFA World CupFIFA World Cup: The city of Boston has announced a paid bus service, the "Boston Stadium Express," for the FIFA World Cup 2026, costing Rs 8,840.90 per round trip to Gillette Stadium. The service, operated with Yankee Line, is part of broader concerns over rising costs and accessibility for fans attending the tournament.

Fast bowler Mayank Yadav fit to play against RCB, says Tom MoodyRCB vs LSG: Lucknow Super Giants have their best fast bowlers fit and ready for their next game against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. LSG could have the services of Mayank Yadav, one of India's fast bowlers, back for the RCB game.

US Soccer Federation sporting director leaves just two months before World CupMatt Crocker has resigned as the sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation just two months before the World Cup. He is set to take up a new role in Saudi Arabia, although details of the position have not been disclosed.

CSK's Ruturaj Gaikwad under pressure after fifth successive failure in IPL 2026Ruturaj Gaikwad's struggles in IPL 2026 continued as the Chennai Super Kings captain registered his fifth successive failure, managing just 63 runs in five innings and failing to provide solid starts at the top.

Premier League: Head coach Andoni Iraola to leave Bournemouth at end of seasonAndoni Iraola is set to leave AFC Bournemouth at the end of the season. The 43-year-old Spaniard guided the Cherries to a ninth-place finish in the Premier League last season, their highest-ever points tally in the competition.

No MS Dhoni for CSK, Varun Chakravarthy returns for KKR in ChennaiCSK vs KKR: Kolkata Knight Riders made a key change in their bowling attack in their away game against Chennai Super Kings on Tuesday. Varun Chakravarthy returned to the line-up at the expense of Navdeep Saini.

How MS Dhoni's success mantra became key to Ayush Mhatre's U-19 World Cup winAhead of his maiden Under-19 World Cup stint as captain, Ayush Mhatre sought guidance from MS Dhoni, whose advice on staying calm under pressure shaped India's title-winning campaign.

SRH bowling attack depleted further as star pacer gets ruled out of IPL 2026IPL 2026: SunRisers Hyderabad's bowling stocks were further depleted on Tuesday, after their star pacer Brydon Carse was ruled out of the tournament. SRH have signed a replacement for the player.

Fuel crisis in India? Mohsin Naqvi's bizarre excuse for empty PSL stands stuns reporterPCB chief Mohsin Naqvi has faced backlash after claiming India faces a petrol crisis, even as PSL matches continue behind closed doors due to Pakistan's earlier cited fuel concerns.

Virat Kohli injury update: RCB star trains in Bengaluru. Will he play vs LSG?IPL 2026: Virat Kohli trained on Tuesday, batting fluently in the nets as concerns over his ankle injury eased. The star batter is likely to feature in RCB's home game against Lucknow Super Giants on Wednesday.

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".
